issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect requires: (1) looking at 3 cards from top of deck, (2) revealing up to 1 Celestial Dragons card OTHER THAN Saint Shalria, (3) adding it to hand, (4) trashing the rest of the 3 cards. Current DSL only searches by type 'Celestial Dragons' without the Saint Shalria exclusion and does not trash the remaining 2 cards.

TrashFromHand is disconnected from SearchDeck logic. The effect should trash 1 card from hand AFTER the search/trash sequence is complete, but the DSL structure suggests it's independent. The sequence must be: search 3 → reveal up to 1 (excluding Saint Shalria) to hand → trash remaining 2 → then trash 1 from hand.
Filter uses 'ByName' kind with 'Celestial Dragons' which appears to be a type, not a card name. Should use type-based filtering with exclusion for Saint Shalria.
